---
title: "Adjust P"
author: "Spike"
date: "2025-08-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Adjust p-values for Moderation Effects (Holm & BH)
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
library(dplyr)
library(openxlsx)
library(readxl)
library(bruceR)

mods <- read_xlsx(
  "results/"
)

mods_adj <- mods %>%
  group_by(DV) %>%
  mutate(
    p_holm = p.adjust(p_value, method = "holm"),
    p_BH   = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

bruceR::export(
  mods_adj,
  "results/"
)
